title: Luffy Puts the Hat on Nami
description: On pages 13–16, luffy puts the hat on nami focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.
scene: On pages 13–16, luffy puts the hat on nami focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey! Are you two alright!? Were you done in by Arlong!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Could you please move out of the way? We have business to settle with those fishmen!

summary: This part turns Nami’s private suffering into an open crisis, ending with the emotional choice to rely on Luffy.
